---
title: Synthetic Cooling Corridors Brief
date: 2026-06-13
---

# Synthetic Cooling Corridors Brief

The evaluation city tested shaded walking corridors along two school routes.
The synthetic evidence says the shaded walking corridors reduced afternoon
surface temperatures at the midpoint sensors compared with the unshaded
comparison route.

The brief does not include maintenance-cost estimates. It only describes the
temperature result and route-selection assumptions.
